tuv.seg: { $actionType }<playIcon></playIcon> did they accurately speak the sentence?
{ $actionType }<playIcon></playIcon> èske yo te di fraz la avèk presizyon?
{ $actionType }<recordIcon></recordIcon> Lè sa a, li fraz la byen fò
Add a language you want to contribute to
Ajoute yon lang ou vle kontribye ladan'l
Ajoute lang pou travay avèk yo
Ou deja genyen yon kont? Ebyen <login>Konekte</login>
An error occurred submitting your voice information
Yon erè te fèt lè'w te voye enfòmasyon vwa'w

Anonymized user data like age, gender, and accent helps improve the audio data used to train the accuracy of speech recognition engines. Your username and email will never be associated with your submitted data, and you can choose whether to make your username public or anonymous.

Done itilizatè anonimize tankou laj, sèks, ak dyalèk ede amelyore done odyo yo ki itilize pou antrene presizyon nan motè rekonesans lapawòl. Non itilizatè'w ak imel ou pap janm asosye ak done ou soumèt, epi ou ka chwazi si'w vle fè non itilizatè ou an piblik oswa anonim.
A voice clip is marked "valid" when a user gives it a Yes vote.
Yon clip vwa make "valid" lè yon itilizatè ba li yon vòt Wi.
By editing your goal, you may lose your existing progress.
Lè'w modifye objektif ou, ou ka pèdi pwogrè ki egziste deja.
By opting in to receive emails you state that you are okay with Mozilla handling this info as explained in Mozilla’s <privacyLink>Privacy Policy</privacyLink>.
Lè'w chwazi pou resevwa imèl, ou deklare ou dakò pou Mozilla jere enfòmasyon sa yo jan yo eksplike sa nan <privacyLink>Politik sou enfòmasyon prive</privacyLink> Mozilla.
By providing some information about yourself, the audio data you submit to Common Voice will be more useful to Speech Recognition engines that use this data to improve their accuracy.
Lè'w bay kèk enfòmasyon sou tèt ou, done odyo ou voye bay Common Voice yo ap pi itil pou Motè rekonesans Lapawòl ki itilize done sa yo pou amelyore presizyon yo.
Change your email via Settings under Login Identity
Chanje imel ou atravè Konfigirasyon anba Idantite Konekte
Collecting sentences from the public domain, or writing new ones for the public domain.
Kolekte fraz ki soti nan domèn piblik la, oswa ekri nouvo fraz pou domèn piblik la.
Common Voice is Mozilla's initiative to help teach machines how real people speak.
Common Voice se inisyativ Mozilla pou aprann machin kijan moun pale.
Common Voice is part of Mozilla's initiative to help teach machines how real people speak.
Common Voice se yon pati nan inisyativ Mozilla pou ede anseye machin ki jan moun reyèl pale.
Patisipasyon kominote a ak pran desizyon.
Content available under a <licenseLink>Creative Commons license</licenseLink>
Kontni ki disponib anba yon <licenseLink>Lisans Creative Commons</licenseLink>
Could not change settings. Please try again.
Pa t 'kapab chanje paramèt yo. Tanpri eseye ankò.
Could not remove language: language not found
Pa t 'kapab retire lang nan: pa jwenn lang nan
Don't see your language on Common Voice yet?
Ou poko wè lang paw' la sou Common Voice kounye a?
Telechaje gwoup done yo an gwo
Do you want to Speak, Listen or both?
Èske ou vle Pale, Koute oswa toude?
During contribution submission feedback will be skipped after clicking 'Submit'. Contribution will continue directly with the next set of 5 recordings or validations.
Pandan kontribisyon soumisyon reaksyon yo pral sote apre'w klike sou 'Soumèt'. Kontribisyon ap kontinye dirèkteman ak pwochen seri 5 anrejistreman oswa validation yo.
<emailFragment>Sign up</emailFragment> to our mailing list to learn how you can take part in campaigns, events and co-design features on Common Voice.
<emailFragment>Enskri</emailFragment> nan lis adrès nou an pou aprann kijan ou ka patisipe nan kanpay, evènman ak karakteristik ko-design sou Common Voice.
Email is already used for a different account
Imèl sa deja itilize pou yon lòt kont
Enter email to send a sign up link
Antre imel pou voye yon lyen pou enskri
Error while fetching rejected sentences. Please try again.
Erè pandan ap chèche fraz rejte yo. Tanpri eseye ankò.
Failed to delete selected sentences… Please try again!
Echwe nan efase fraz chwazi yo... Tanpri eseye ankò!
Fields marked with an asterisk (*) are required.
Liy fòm ki make ak yon asterisk (*) obligatwa

For technology to work well for everyone, the data that helps developers to build technology needs to reflect a diverse range of people. For example, if we don't include any speakers with a particular accent, then the technology won't work well for people with that accent. <learnMore>Learn more about why metadata matters.</learnMore>

Pou teknoloji sa travay byen pou tout moun, done ki ede devlopè yo pou bati teknoloji sa bezwen reflete yon seri divès moun. Pa egzanp, si nou pa mete okenn moun ki pale ak yon aksan patikilye, Lè sa a, teknoloji a pa pral travay byen pou moun ki gen aksan sa a. <learnMore>Aprann plis sou poukisa metadata enpòtan.</learnMore>
Great! How many clips a week?
Trè byen! Konbyen odyo pa jou?
Great! How many clips per day?
Trè byen! Konbyen odyo pa jou?
Trè byen!<recordIcon></recordIcon> Anrejistre pwochen odyo'w la
Great work!<playIcon></playIcon> Listen again when you're ready
Bèl travay!<playIcon></playIcon> Koute ankò lè'w pare
Èske w li kondisyon nou yo?
Having an account is not required to contribute, though it is helpful.
Ou pa oblije gen yon kont pou kontribye, poutan li tap itil.
Help teach machines how real people speak, donate your voice at { $link }
Ede antrene machin yo kijan moun reyèl yo pale, bay vwa'w kòm donasyon nan { $link }
Help us build a high quality, publicly open dataset
Ede nou konstwi yon seri done ki gen bon jan kalite, ki louvri piblikman
Help us find more voices, share your goal
Ede nou jwenn plis vwa, pataje objektif ou
Help us find others to donate their voice!
Ede nou jwenn lòt moun pou bay vwa pa yo!
Here are some tips to find sentences:
Men kèk konsèy pou jwenn fraz yo:
Ki jan yo pran desizyon pwojè yo?
How can I get the Common Voice data?
Kijan mwen ka jwenn done Common Voice yo?
How can we effectively grow a language on Common Voice?
Ki jan nou ka efektivman devlope yon lang sou Common Voice?
How does Common Voice calculate hours?
Ki jan Common Voice kalkile èdtan?
How do I access and use the dataset?
Kouman pou mwen jwenn aksè ak itilize done yo?
How do I add a language?
Kouman pou mwen ajoute yon lang?
How do I know whether to approve a voice clip?
Kouman pou mwen konnen si pou apwouve yon klip vwa?
How do I record a high quality voice clip?
Kouman pou mwen anrejistre yon clip vwa kalite siperyè?
How do I stay in touch?
Kouman pou mwen rete an kontak?
How do you ensure anonymity and privacy of the people who donated their voices?
Ki jan ou asire anonimite ak vi prive moun ki bay vwa yo?
How would you describe your accent?
Ki jan ou ta dekri dyalèk ou a?
I agree to Common Voice's <termsLink>Terms</termsLink> and <privacyLink>Privacy Notice</privacyLink>
Mwen dakò ak <termsLink>Kondisyon</termsLink> ak <privacyLink>Avi sou enfòmasyon prive</privacyLink> Common Voice.
I am a non-native speaker and I speak with an accent, do you still want my voice?
Mwen se yon moun ki pa pale natif natal epi mwen pale ak yon aksan, ou toujou vle vwa mwen?
I'd like to receive emails such as goal reminders, my progress updates and newsletters about Common Voice.
Mwen ta renmen resevwa Imèl tankou rapèl objektif, dènye pwogrè mwen ak bilten sou Common Voice.
If the sentence does not meet the above criteria, click the "Reject" button on the left. If you are unsure about the sentence, you may also skip it and move on to the next one.
Si fraz la pa satisfè kritè ki anwo yo, klike sou "Rejte" bouton sou bò gòch la. Si ou pa sèten sou fraz la, ou ka sote'l tou epi ale nan pwochen an.
If the sentence meets the criteria, click the "Approve" button.
Si fraz la satisfè kritè yo, klike sou bouton "Apwouve".
If the sentence meets the criteria, click the "Approve" button on the right.
Si fraz la satisfè kritè yo, klike sou "Apwouve" bouton sou bò dwat la.
If you're looking to speak more about the dataset, want to co-invest in planned platform expansions or look for collaboration opportunities, <emailFragment>drop us a line.</emailFragment>
Si w ap chèche pale plis sou seri done a, si w vle ko-envesti nan planifye agrandisman platfòm an oswa chèche opòtinite kolaborasyon, <emailFragment>depoze nou yon mo.</emailFragment>
If you run out of sentences to review, please help us collect more sentences!
Si'w fini ak fraz pou revize, tanpri ede nou kolekte plis fraz!
I'm okay with you handling this info as you explain in Mozilla's <privacyLink>Privacy Policy</privacyLink>
Mwen dakò ak ou jere enfòmasyon sa jan ou eksplike nan <privacyLink>Politik sou enfòmasyon prive</privacyLink> Mozilla.
Includes email, username & demographic info, available right away
Gen ladann imèl, non itilizatè ak enfòmasyon demografik, ki disponib touswit
Interested in learning more and contributing to the project?
Ou enterese aprann plis ak kontribiye nan pwojè a?
Èske enfòmasyon sou kont mwen an piblik?
Is the goal of Common Voice to build a voice assistant?
Èske objektif Common Voice pou konstwi yon asistan vwa?
It contains words or phrases that are hard to read or pronounce.
Li gen mo oswa fraz ki difisil pou ka li oswa pwononse.
It is written in a language different than what I’m speaking.
Li ekri nan yon lang diferan de sa m'ap pale.
It takes a lot to make Common Voice happen! We don't do it alone. Want to partner with us? We'd love to hear from you.
Li pran anpil pou fè Common Voice rive! Nou pa fè li pou kont nou. Ou vle asosye avèk nou? Nou ta renmen tande pale de ou.
I want to join the Common Voice mailing list
Mwen vle rantre nan lis adrès Common Voice la
Join the Common Voice mailing list
Antre nan lis postal Common Voice lan
Keep track of your progress and metrics across multiple languages.
Kenbe tras pwogrè'w ak meziman nan plizyè lang.
Keep track of your progress with a profile
Kenbe tras pwogrè'w ak yon pwofil
Keep track of your progress with a profile and help our voice data be more accurate.
Kenbe tras de pwogrè'w ak yon pwofil epi ede done vwa nou yo vinn pi egzak.
Large scale corporates and platform companies
Gwo echèl antrepriz ak konpayi platfòm
Leaving now means you’ll lose your changes
Si'w kite kounye a vle di ou pral pèdi chanjman'w yo
Leaving now means you'll lose your progress
Si'w kite kounye a sa vle di w'ap pèdi pwogrè'w fè
Log in or sign up to get started
Log In / Sign Up with { $company } email
Looks like there aren't any clips to listen to in this language. Help us fill the queue by recording some now.
Sanble pa gen okenn son pou koute nan lang sa a. Ede nou ranpli ke a lèw anrejistre kèk kounye a.
Make sure the sentence meets the following criteria:
Asire'w ke fraz la satisfè kritè sa yo:
Make sure the sentence meets the following criteria:
Asire'w ke fraz la satisfè kritè sa yo:
Make your submitted data as rich as possible by providing some anonymous demographic data. We de-identify all demographic data before making it public.
Fè done ou soumèt yo valab ke posib lè w bay kèk done demografik anonim. Nou de-idantifye tout done demografik anvan nou fè yo piblik.

Most of the data used by large companies isn’t available to the majority of people. We think that stifles innovation. So we’ve launched Common Voice, a project to help make voice recognition open and accessible to everyone.

Pifò nan done yo ki itilize pa gwo konpayi yo pa disponib pou majorite moun. Nou panse ke sa anpeche inovasyon. Se konsa, nou te lanse Project Common Voice, yon pwojè pou ede fè vwa rekonesans pou ekri Haitian ouvè a tout moun.

Most of the data used by large companies isn’t available to the majority of people. We think that stifles innovation. So we’ve launched Project Common Voice, a project to help make voice recognition open to everyone.

Pifò nan done yo itilize pa gwo konpayi yo pa disponib pou majorite moun. Nou panse ke sa anpeche inovasyon. Se konsa, nou te lanse Project Common Voice, yon pwojè pou ede fè vwa rekonesans pou ekri Haitian ouvè a tout moun.
Mozilla Common Voice is an initiative to help teach machines how real people speak.
Mozilla Common Voice se yon inisyativ pou ede anseye machin ki jan moun reyèl pale.

Mozilla is dedicated to keeping the web open and accessible for everyone. To do that we need to empower web creators through projects like Common Voice. As voice technologies proliferate beyond niche applications, we believe they must serve all users equally. That means investing in more languages and accommodating diverse accents and demographics when building and testing voice technologies. Common Voice is a public resource available to everyone and Mozilla teams and developers around the world are already using it on our own projects as well.

Mozilla dedye nan kenbe entènèt la louvri epi aksesib pou tout moun. Pou fè sa, nou bezwen otorize kreyatè entènèt yo atravè pwojè tankou Common Voice. Lè teknoloji vwa pwopaje pi lwen tikal nich aplikasyon yo, nou kwè yo dwe sèvi tout itilizatè yo egalman. Sa vle di envesti nan plis lang ak akomode aksan divès ak demografik lè teknoloji vwa ap bati ak teste . Common Voice se yon resous piblik ki disponib pou tout moun ak ekip Mozilla e devlopè atravè mond lan deja itilize li sou pwòp pwojè nou yo tou.
No gravatar found for your email
Pa gen gravatar pou imèl ou
Pa gen okenn fraz rejte ki jwenn!
Note: You will still need to select between Speak or Listen to change contribution type.
Remak: W ap toujou bezwen chwazi ant Pale oswa Koute pou chanje kalite kontribisyon.
Non mèsi, ou mèt kontinye pale

Now you can donate your voice to help us build an open-source voice database that anyone can use to make innovative apps for devices and the web. Read a sentence to help machines learn how real people speak. Check the work of other contributors to improve the quality. It’s that simple!

Koulye a, ou ka bay vwa ou pou ede nou bati yon baz done vwa ak kòd sous ouvè ke nenpòt moun ka itilize pou fè aplikasyon inovatè pou aparèy ak entènèt la. Li yon fraz pou ede machin yo aprann kijan moun reyèl yo pale. Tcheke travay lòt moun ki kontribitè yo pou amelyore kalite a. Li senp konsa!
Once logged in you can select your languages from the profile section.
Yon fwa ou konekte ou ka chwazi lang ou yo nan seksyon pwofil la.
On desktop devices you can contribute by downloading…
Sou aparèy Desktop ou ka kontribye lè'w telechaje...
On his head he wore a beret.
Sou tèt li li te mete yon bere.
On iOS please continue with Safari to enable recording…
Sou iOS tanpri kontinye ak Safari pou pèmèt anrejistreman...
Optionally join on our email list for updates and new information about the project.
Opsyonèlman rantre nan lis imèl nou an pou pwogrè ak nouvo enfòmasyon sou pwojè a.

Optionally submitted demographic data (e.g. age, gender, language, and accent) will never be made public on your profile, and will not be linked to your account in the dataset. Individual audio clips will be associated with demographic data for the purpose of more accurate analysis - for example, a researcher might want to target a training model to a specific demographic segment.

Done demografik ou te soumèt (pa egzanp, laj, sèks, lang, ak aksan) pa'p janm pibliye sou pwofil ou a, epi yo pa'p lye ak kont ou nan seri done a. Klip odyo endividyèl yo pral asosye ak done demografik nan bi pou analize yo pi egzak - pou egzanp, yon chèchè ta ka vle vize yon modèl fòmasyon nan yon segman demografik espesifik.
Other people validate those voice clips.
Lòt moun valide klip vwa sa yo.
Our governance is founded on the pillars of:
Gouvènans nou an baze sou poto sa yo:
Overall project status: see how far we’ve come!
Estati pwojè an jeneral: gade ki jan nou te avanse!
Partner with local organizations or individuals
Patenarya ak òganizasyon lokal oswa moun
Demann telechajman anrejistreman ki sot pase yo
People come and contribute their voices.
Moun vini e kontribye vwa yo.
Please confirm that these sentences are public domain.
Tanpri konfime ke fraz sa yo se domèn piblik.
Please select a language to review sentences.
Tanpri chwazi yon lang pou revize fraz yo.
Press play, listen & tell us: did they accurately speak the sentence below?
Peze jwe, koute epi di nou: èske yo te byen pale fraz ki anba a?
Press { shortcut-play-toggle } to toggle play mode
Peze { shortcut-play-toggle } pou chanje mòd jwe
Profile information improves the audio data used in training speech recognition accuracy.
Enfòmasyon sou pwofil amelyore done odyo yo ki itilize nan fòmasyon presizyon rekonesans lapawòl.
Read more on our About page
Li plis sou paj About nou an
Read the sentence carefully - don’t miss, change or add words.
Li fraz la ak anpil atansyon - pa manke, chanje oswa ajoute mo.
Receive emails such as challenge and goal reminders, progress updates, and newsletters about Common Voice.
Resevwa Imèl tankou rapèl defi ak objektif, dènye pwogrè, ak bilten enfòmasyon sou Common Voice.
Recording voice clips is an integral part of building our open dataset; some would say it's the fun part too.
Anrejistreman son vwa se yon pati entegral nan bati done ouvè nou an; gen moun ki ta di se pati ki amizan tou.
Rapò a te pase avèk siksè
Return here to edit your goal anytime.
Retounen isit la pou modifye objektif ou nenpòt lè.
Retounen nan ansanm done Common Voice yo
Review could not be saved. Please try again later.
Revizyon pa t 'kapab sere. Tanpri eseye ankò pita.
Reviewed sentences not submitted, are sure?
Fraz revize yo pa soumèt, èske'w sèten?
Review & re-record clips here as you go
Revize ak re-anrejistre odyo yo isit la pandan w'ap kontinye
Revize epi re-anrejistre odyo yo si sa nesesè
Search for them on the Internet
See how your progress compares to other contributors all over the world.
Gade ki jan pwogrè'w konpare ak lòt kontribitè nan tout mond lan.
Sentence must contain between 1 and 14 (inclusive) words
Fraz dwe genyen ant 1 ak 14 mo (enklizif).
Sentences are collected for people to read aloud.
Yo kolekte fraz pou moun yo li awotvwa.
Fraz la pa ta dwe genyen abrevyasyon
Fraz lapa ta dwe gen nimewo
Fraz la pa ta dwe gen senbòl

Sentences must be reviewed and accepted by two people to be included in Common Voice. You create guidelines for your language <languageGuidelinesLink>here</languageGuidelinesLink>. Sentences must be in the <licenseLink>public domain</licenseLink> and shorter than 15 words. You can ask the owner of a text to make it <waiverLink>CC0 using our waiver process</waiverLink>, and send to us on commonvoice@mozilla.com

Fraz yo dwe revize epi aksepte pa de moun pou yo enkli nan Common Voice. Ou kreye gid pou lang ou <languageGuidelinesLink>isit</languageGuidelinesLink>. Fraz yo dwe nan <licenseLink>domèn piblik</licenseLink> epi yo dwe pi kout pase 15 mo. Ou ka mande pwopriyetè yon tèks pou fè l <waiverLink>CC0 lè l sèvi avèk pwosesis egzansyon nou an</waiverLink>, epi voye l ba nou sou commonvoice@mozilla.com.
Sentences not submitted, are you sure you want to leave?
Fraz yo pa soumèt, èske ou sèten ou vle kite?
Share your { $count } Clip Daily Goal for { $type }
Pataje objektif chak jou { $count } ou pou { $type }
Share your { $count } Clip Weekly Goal for { $type }
Pataje { $count } objektif chak semèn ou pou { $type }
Montre tout fraz sote yo ankò
Sign up for Common Voice newsletters, goal reminders and progress updates
Enskri pou bilten Common Voice, rapèl objektif ak pwogrè
Small businesses, including tech and AI start ups
Ti biznis, ki gen ladan teknoloji ak EA k'ap debite
Someone asks for a language to be added.
Yon moun mande pou ajoute yon lang.
Sorry, Common Voice is running slowly. Thanks for your interest.
Eskize nou, Common Voice ap kouri twò lan kounya. Mèsi pou enterè'w.
Eskize nou, yon bagay te mal pase
Ou mèt pale, kontribye isit la!

Speech is often the most natural way we communicate with each other and voice technologies are bringing that convenience to our computers and mobile devices. We want to empower developers to build amazing voice recognition applications like real-time translators and voice-enabled digital assistants. But right now most of the voice data required to build these kinds of apps is expensive and proprietary. We hope the Common Voice dataset will give developers what they need to innovate and make speech technology available in their own language.
To make voice recognition even more universal, we're collecting voice samples in widely spoken languages as well as those with a smaller population of speakers often underserved by commercial speech recognition services. Publishing a diverse dataset of voices will empower developers, entrepreneurs, and entire speech communities to address this gap themselves.

Lapawòl se souvan fason ki pi natirèl nou kominike youn ak lòt ak teknoloji vwa yo ap pote konvenyans sa nan òdinatè nou yo ak aparèy mobil yo. Nou vle pèmèt devlopè yo bati aplikasyon pou rekonesans vwa eksepsyonel tankou jan moun tradiktè yo fè'l an tan reyèl ak tankou asistan dijital ki travay ak vwa. Men kounye a pi fò nan done vwa ki nesesè pou bati kalite aplikasyon sa yo chè anpil e yon gent mèt pa yo. Nou espere ke seri done Common Voice la pral bay devlopè yo sa yo bezwen pou yo inove epi fè teknoloji lapawòl disponib nan pwòp lang yo.
Pou rann rekonesans vwa a vin pi inivèsèl, n'ap kolekte echantiyon vwa nan lang yo pale anpil ansanm ak moun ki gen yon popilasyon ki pi piti nan moun ki pi souvan yo pa sèvis rekonesans lapawòl ak pwodwi komèsyal chè yo. Pibliye yon seri done divès vwa pral pèmèt devlopè yo, antreprenè yo, ak tout kominote lapawòl yo abòde diferans sa nan mitan yo.
Start typing to describe your accent
Kòmanse tape pou dekri dyalèk ou

Sentence Collector is a tool for collecting and validating public domain sentences. You will need to create an account. Then, add your language to your Profile. You can Add sentences or Review previously-added sentences.

Sentence Collectorse yon zouti pou kolekte epi valide santans domèn piblik yo. Ou pral bezwen kreye yon kont. Apre sa, ajoute lang ou nan Profilou. Ou ka Ajoute fraz oswa Revize fraz ki te ajoute deja.
Taking several attempts to read a word.
Pran plizyè tantativ pou li yon mo.
Tell us what you'd like to download:
Di nou sa'w ta renmen telechaje:
Thanks for confirming your account, now let's build your profile.
Mèsi paske ou konfime kont ou, kounye a ann bati pwofil ou.
Thank you for contributing your voice!
Thank you for donating your voice clips!
Mèsi paske w bay klip vwa w yo!
Thank you for recording!<lineBreak></lineBreak>Now review and submit your clips below.
Mèsi pou anrejistreman!<lineBreak></lineBreak>Koulye a, revize epi voye klip ou yo anba a.

Thank you for your interest in contributing to { $lang }. We work hard to get every language ready for launch and keep the teams updated via email. If you want to contribute, please provide your email below.
Mèsi poutèt ou enterese kontribye nan lang { $lang } a. Nou travay di pou tout lang pare pou lanse epi kontinye met ekip yo ajou pa imèl. Si ou vle kontribye, tanpri mete imèl ou anba a.
Thank you for your voice information
Thank you! You’ve sent a new language enquiry
Mèsi! Ou te mande yon nouvo lang
The clip has disrespectful or offensive language.
Odyo a gen yon langaj derespektan oswa ofansif.

The Common Voice dataset complements Mozilla’s open source voice recognition engine Deep Speech. The first version of Deep Speech was released in November 2017 and has continued to evolve ever since. Together with the Common Voice dataset, we believe this open source voice recognition technology should be available to everybody. It’s our hope these technologies will enable developers to build a wave of innovative products and services.

Ansanm done Common Voice konplete motè rekonesans vwa sous pwogram louvri Mozilla Deep Speech. Premye vèsyon Deep Speech te pibliye an Novanm 2017 e li kontinye evolye depi lè sa a. Ansanm ak seri done Common Voice, nou kwè teknoloji rekonesans vwa sous pwogram louvri sa dwe disponib pou tout moun. Nou espere ke teknoloji sa yo pral pèmèt devlopè yo bati yon bann pwodwi ak sèvis inovatè.

The Common Voice dataset is available for download under the <licenseLink>CC0</licenseLink> license on <datasetLink>our Datasets page</datasetLink>. You can also download several other publicly available datasets from the same page.

Ansanm done Common Voice la disponib pou telechaje anba lisans <licenseLink>CC0</licenseLink> sou <datasetLink>paj Datasets nou an</datasetLink>. Ou ka telechaje plizyè lòt done ki disponib piblikman nan menm paj la.
The count of voice recording hours we have collected so far.
Konte èdtan anrejistreman vwa nou te kolekte jiskaprezan.
The giant dinosaurs of the Triassic.
Dinozò yo jeyan nan triyas la.

The goal of the Common Voice dataset is to enable anyone in the world to build speech recognition, speaker recognition, or any other type of application that requires voice data. A voice assistant is just one of many types of applications you could use the dataset to build.

Objektif done Common Voice la se pou pèmèt nenpòt moun nan mond lan bati rekonesans lapawòl, rekonesans moun k'ap pale, oswa nenpòt lòt kalite aplikasyon ki mande done vwa. Yon asistan vwa se jis youn nan plizyè kalite aplikasyon ou ta ka itilize ansanm done a pou konstwi.

The multi-language version of the Common Voice dataset is currently undergoing community supported bundling and cleaning. If you would like to help us bring Common Voice to new languages, go check out the <sentenceCollectorLink>Sentence Collection Tool</sentenceCollectorLink> for adding new sentences to the dataset, and Mozilla <pontoonLink>Pontoon</pontoonLink> for translating the website itself. New languages are added to Common Voice for voice contribution when 5000 approved sentences have been collected.

Vèsyon plizyè lang nan seri done Common Voice la kounye a ap sibi gwoupman ak netwayaj nan kominote a. Si ou ta renmen ede nou pote Common Voice nan nouvo lang, ale tcheke <sentenceCollectorLink>Outil Koleksyon Fraz</sentenceCollectorLink> pou ajoute nouvo fraz nan seri done a, epi Mozilla <pontoonLink>Pontoon</pontoonLink> pou tradwi sit entènèt la tou. Nouvo lang yo vin ajoute nan Common Voice pou kontribisyon vwa lè 5000 fraz yo te kolekte yo apwouve.
The number of recordings and which languages you contribute to will be public.
Kantite anrejistreman ak nan ki lang ou kontribye yo pral piblik.
The selected file is too large
Fichye ou chwazi a twò gwo
The sentence has a grammatical or spelling error.
Fraz la gen yon erè gramatikal oswa òtograf.
The sentence has disrespectful or offensive language.
Fraz lan gen yon langaj derespektan oswa ofansif.
The sentence must be grammatically correct.
The sentence must be grammatically correct.
The sentence must be spelled correctly.
The sentence must be spelled correctly.
The site is ready to be launched when it reaches 75% completion.
Sit la pare pou lanse lè li rive nan 75% fini.
The website text is translated into that language.
Tèks sit entènèt la tradwi nan lang sa a.
This is approximately the number of hours required to train a production speech-to-text system.
Sa se apeprè kantite èdtan ki nesesè pou fòme yon sistèm pwodiksyon diskou a tèks.
Track progress here and on your stats page.
Swiv pwogrè isit la ak sou paj estatistik ou a.
Translation of the Common Voice site happens on Pontoon.
Tradiksyon sit Common Voice la fèt sou Pontoon.
Understand what to look for when listening to voice clips and help make your voice recordings richer too!
Konprann sa pou'w chèche lè w'ap koute klip vwa yo epi ede fè anrejistreman vwa'w yo vin pi rich tou!
Repons inatandi tounen soti nan sèvè
{ $unreviewedSentencesByYou } sentences left for you to review.
{ $unreviewedSentencesByYou } fraz ki rete pou'w revize yo.
Upload of this clip keeps failing at server. Reload the page or try again later.
Videyo ou monte a kontinye ap echwe sou sèvè. Rafrechi paj la oswa eseye ankò pita.
Upload of this clip keeps failing, keep retrying?
Videyo w'ap monte a kontinye ap echwe, kontinye eseye?
Users validate the accuracy of donated clips, checking that the speaker read the sentence correctly.
Itilizatè yo valide presizyon klip yo bay yo, tcheke si moun nan li fraz la kòrèkteman.
Validating donated clips is equally important to the Common Voice mission. Take a listen and help us create quality open source voice data.
Validasyon klip moun bay yo egalman enpòtan pou misyon Common Voice la. Pran yonn koute epi ede nou kreye bon jan kalite done vwa sous louvri.
Variants are a specific form of a language - for example shared by those living in a geography or commmunity. Sometimes these are called dialects.
Varyan(dyalèk) se yon fòm espesifik nan yon lang - pa egzanp pataje pa moun k ap viv nan yon jewografi oswa kominote. Pafwa yo rele sa yo dyalèk.
View your progress against personal and project goals.
Gade pwogrè'w kont objektif pèsonèl ak objektif pwojè yo.

Voice is natural, voice is human. That’s why we’re excited about creating usable voice technology for our machines. But to create voice systems, developers need an extremely large amount of voice data.
Vwa natirèl, vwa se moun. Se poutèt sa nou kontan anpil nan kreye teknoloj vwa pou machin nou yo ka itilize. Men, pou kreye sistèm vwa, yon gwo kantite done vwa obligatwa.
Voice is natural, voice is human. That’s why we’re fascinated with creating usable voice technology for our machines. But to create voice systems, an extremely large amount of voice data is required.
Vwa natirèl, vwa se moun. Se poutèt sa nou kontan anpil nan kreye teknoloj vwa pou machin nou yo ka itilize. Men, pou kreye sistèm vwa, yon gwo kantite vwa done obligatwa.

Voice recognition technology is revolutionizing the way we interact with machines, but the currently available systems are expensive and proprietary. Common Voice is part of Mozilla’s initiative to make voice recognition technologies better and more accessible for everyone. Common Voice is a massive global database of donated voices that lets anyone quickly and easily train voice-enabled apps in potentially every language.

Teknoloji rekonesans vwa a ap revolisyone fason nou kominike avèk machin yo, men sistèm ki disponib kounye a yo chè e yo gen mèt pa yo. Common Voice fè pati inisyativ Mozilla pou fè teknoloji rekonesans vwa yo pi byen ak plis aksesib pou tout moun. Common Voice se yon gwo baz done mondyal ki gen vwa ki pèmèt nenpòt moun antrene aplikasyon pou vwa yo byen vit e fasil nan tout lang.

Voice recognition technology is revolutionizing the way we interact with machines, but the currently available systems are expensive and proprietary. Mozilla Common Voice is an initiative to make voice recognition technologies better and more accessible for everyone. Common Voice is a massive global database of donated voices that lets anyone quickly and easily train voice-enabled apps in potentially every language.
We're not only collecting voice samples in widely spoken languages but also in those with a smaller population of speakers. Publishing a diverse dataset of voices will empower developers, entrepreneurs, and communities to address this gap themselves.

Teknoloji rekonesans vwa a ap revolisyone fason nou kominike avèk machin yo, men sistèm ki disponib kounye a yo chè ak pwòp. Mozilla Common Voice se yon inisyativ pou fè teknoloji rekonesans vwa yo pi byen ak plis aksesib pou tout moun. Common Voice se yon gwo baz done mondyal ki gen vwa ki pèmèt nenpòt moun antrene aplikasyon pou vwa yo byen vit e fasil nan tout lang.
Nou pa sèlman kolekte echantiyon vwa nan lang yo pale anpil men tou nan moun ki gen yon popilasyon ki pi piti nan moun ki pale lang panyo. Pibliye yon seri done divès vwa pral pèmèt devlopè, antreprenè, ak kominote yo abòde diferans sa nan mitan yo.
Vwa yo Ki An liy Kounye a
Want to save your information? <createProfile>Create a profile</createProfile>
Ou vle kenbe enfòmasyon'w yo? <createProfile>Ebyen kreye yon pwofil</createProfile>
Want to stay in touch with Common Voice?
Ou vle rete an kontak ak Common Voice?
Watch our video explainer to help
Gade esplikasyon videyo nou an pou ede w
We are going out to get a coffee.
We are going out to get coffee.
We at Mozilla are building a community around voice technology. We would like to stay in touch with updates, new data sources and to hear more about how you're using this data.
Nou menm nan Mozilla ap bati yon kominote sou teknoloji vwa. Nou ta renmen rete an kontak ak dènye nouvèl yo, nouvo sous done ak jwenn plis enfòmasyon sou ki jan w ap itilize done sa yo.
We at Mozilla are building a community around voice technology. We would like to stay in touch with updates, new data sources and to hear more about how you're using this data.
Nou menm nan Mozilla ap bati yon kominote sou teknoloji vwa. Nou ta renmen rete an kontak ak dènye nouvèl yo, nouvo sous done ak jwenn plis enfòmasyon sou ki jan w ap itilize done sa yo.
We calculate hours by estimating the average length of each recording, and then multiplying that number by the total number of recordings across all languages.
Nou kalkile èdtan lè nou estime longè mwayèn chak anrejistreman, epi answit miltipliye nimewo sa pa kantite total anrejistreman nan tout lang.
We could not fetch the stats. Please try again later.
Nou pa t 'kapab jwen estatistik yo. Tanpri eseye ankò pita.
We couldn’t find that page for you
Nou pa t 'kapab jwenn paj sa a pou ou
We launch the Common Voice site in this language.
Nou lanse sit Common Voice nan lang sa a.
Welcome to the Common Voice Sentence Collector
Byenvini nan Common Voice Kolektè Fraz
We may have run out of clips - refresh the page, or try again later.
Nou genlè ta fini ak odyo yo - rafrechi paj la, oswa eseye ankò pita.
We promise to handle your information with care. Read more in our <privacyLink>Privacy Notice</privacyLink>.
Nou pwomèt pou nou jere enfòmasyon ou yo avèk swen. Li plis nan <privacyLink>Avi sou Konfidansyalite</privacyLink> nou an.
We promise to handle your information with care. Read more in our <privacyLink>Privacy Notice</privacyLink>.
Nou pwomèt pou nou jere enfòmasyon ou yo avèk swen. Li plis nan <privacyLink>Avi sou Konfidansyalite</privacyLink> nou an.
We’re going out to get coffee.
We release the dataset every 3 months.
Nou pibliye ansanm done a chak 3 mwa.
We're receiving a lot of traffic and are currently investigating the issues.
N'ap resevwa anpil trafik e n'ap mennen ankèt sou pwoblèm yo kounye a.
We’re sorry, your platform is not currently supported.
Nou regrèt sa, platfòm ou a pa sipòte kounye a.
We will be in touch with more information as it becomes available.
Nou gen pou nou pran kontak avè w ak plis enfòmasyon depi yo disponib.
We will not make your email public.
Nou pa'p fè imèl ou an piblik.

We work with foundations, civil society and community partners to make the internet a healthier place, with a particular focus on East Africa. Learn more about our <programmaticWork>programmatic work.</programmaticWork>

Nou travay ak fondasyon, sosyete sivil ak patnè kominotè yo pou fè entènèt la yon kote ki pi an sante, ak yon konsantrasyon patikilye sou Afrik lès. Aprann plis sou <programmaticWork>travay pwogram nou an.</programmaticWork>
What does it mean that I can’t “determine the identity” of speakers in the Common Voice dataset?
Kisa sa vle di mwen pa ka "detèmine idantite" moun ki pale yo nan seri done Common Voice la?
What is a language on Common Voice?
Ki sa ki se yon lang sou Common Voice?
Ki sa ki se Common Voice?
Ki sa ki se Common Voice?
What issues are you experiencing with this sentence?
Ki pwoblèm w'ap fè eksperyans ak fraz sa a?
What kind of goal do you want to build?
Ki kalite objektif ou vle bati?
What level of audio quality is required for a voice clip to be used in the dataset?
Ki nivo bon jan kalite odyo ki nesesè pou yon klip vwa yo dwe itilize nan seri done a?
What’s the difference between Common Voice and Deep Speech?
Ki diferans ki genyen ant Common Voice (vwa komen) ak Deep Speech (diskou pwofon)?
When will you release Common Voice data in other languages?
Kilè w ap pibliye done Common Voice nan lòt lang?
Where are these <wikipediaLink>public domain</wikipediaLink> sentences from?
Ki kote fraz <wikipediaLink>domèn piblik</wikipediaLink> sa yo soti?
Where does the source text come from?
Ki kote tèks sous la soti?
Which variant of { $language } do you speak?
Why don’t you ask people to read from books or Wikipedia articles in different languages?
Poukisa ou pa mande moun li nan liv oswa atik Wikipedya yo nan diferan lang?
Why do you need so many different speakers per language?
Poukisa ou bezwen anpil moun ki pale diferan pou chak lang?
Why is 10,000 validated hours the per language goal for capturing audio?
Poukisa se 10,000 èdtan valide se objektif pou chak lang pou kaptire odyo?
Why is Common Voice part of the Mozilla mission?
Poukisa Common Voice fè pati misyon Mozilla la?
Why is my language not included yet?
Poukisa lang mwen an poko enkli?
Why should I sign up for an account?
Poukisa mwen ta dwe enskri pou yon kont?
With a profile, you can keep track of your activity and connect with a community of voice data contributors.
Avèk yon pwofil, ou ka kenbe tras aktivite'w epi konekte ak yon kominote ki gen kontribitè done vwa yo.
Would you like to share some information about how you speak?
Èske ou ta renmen pataje kèk enfòmasyon sou fason'w pale?
Yes, send me emails. I’d like to stay informed about the Common Voice Project.
Wi, voye imèl ban mwen. Mwen ta renmen rete enfòme sou Pwojè Common Voice lan.
Yes, send me emails. I'd like to stay informed about the progress of this language on Common Voice.
Wi, voye imèl ban mwen. Mwen ta renmen rete enfòme sou pwogrè lang sa a sou Common Voice.

Yes, we especially want your voice! Part of the aim of Common Voice is to gather as many different accents as possible so that voice recognition services work equally well for everyone. This means donations from non-native speakers are particularly important.

Wi, nou espesyalman vle vwa'w! Yon pati nan objektif Common Voice se rasanble otan aksan ak dyalèk diferan posib pou sèvis rekonesans vwa yo travay egalman byen pou tout moun. Sa vle di kontribisyon ki soti nan moun ki pa pale natif natal yo patikilyèman enpòtan.
You are prepared to initiate a download of { $size }
Ou pare pou kòmanse yon telechajman de { $size }
You can choose to make your username public or anonymous.
Ou ka chwazi pou fè non itilizatè ou an piblik oswa anonim.
You can help build a diverse, open-source dataset by creating a Common Voice profile and contributing your voice.
Ou ka ede konstwi yon seri done divès, sous louvri lè'w kreye yon pwofil Common Voice epi kontribye vwa'w.
You can meet others in the Mozilla language communities by joining <discourseLink>Discourse</discourseLink> for topical conversations, or <matrixLink>Matrix</matrixLink> for quick advice.
Ou ka rankontre lòt moun nan kominote lang Mozilla yo lè w rantre nan <discourseLink>Discourse</discourseLink> pou konvèsasyon aktualite, oswa <matrixLink>Matrix</matrixLink> pou jwenn konsèy rapid.
You have not added any languages yet.

Your accent is the way you pronounce words. It can be shaped by where you have lived, which other languages you speak and lots of other factors. You can share any information you feel is relevant here.
Dyalèk ou se fason ou pwononse mo yo. Li ka fòme pa kote ou te viv, ki lòt lang ou pale ak anpil lòt faktè. Ou ka pataje nenpòt enfòmasyon ou santi ki enpòtan isit la.
Your daily goal has been created
Your username and email will not be associated with the published data.
Non itilizatè ou ak imel ou pa'p asosye ak done ki pibliye yo.
Your weekly goal has been created
Objektif chak semèn ou sot kreye
You've helped Common Voice reach <goalPercentage></goalPercentage> of our daily { $goalValue } recording goal!
Ou te ede Common Voice rive nan <goalPercentage></goalPercentage> objektif anrejistreman { $goalValue } nou chak jou!
You've helped Common Voice reach <goalPercentage></goalPercentage> of our daily { $goalValue } validation goal!
Ou te ede Common Voice rive nan <goalPercentage></goalPercentage> nou chak jou pou { $goalValue } objektif validasyon !
You've successfully signed up for contributing to { $language }. Thank you.
Ou reyisi enskri pou kontribye sou lang { $language }. Mèsi.
